# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a React + Vite browser-based game for kids. It uses Tailwind CSS for styling.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: React 19 with Vite (latest)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4
- **Language**: JavaScript (JSX)
- **Target Audience**: Kids (bright colors, simple interactions, fun gameplay)

## Coding Guidelines
- Use functional React components with hooks
- Keep components simple and well-named
- Use Tailwind utility classes for all styling
- Prioritize accessibility and kid-friendly UI (large buttons, bright colors, clear text)
- Avoid complex state — prefer useState and useEffect

## Game Design Principles
- Simple controls (mouse clicks / keyboard arrows)
- Positive reinforcement (sounds, animations on success)
- No violent or inappropriate content
- Fun, colorful, and engaging visuals

## Checklist
- [x] copilot-instructions.md created
- [x] Project scaffolded
- [x] Tailwind CSS installed
- [x] Kids game implemented (Memory Match card game)
- [x] Extensions installed (none required)
- [x] Project compiles without errors
- [x] Dev task created and running
- [x] README updated
